name: aidev-toolkit
description: Chat with your AI Dev Toolkit — review files, generate tests, fix bugs, and run all 19 agentic workflows via @aidev in Copilot Chat.

chatParticipants.name: aidev
chatParticipants.description: Your agentic AI toolkit — review, test, fix, heal, generate, and more.

commands.name: review
commands.description: Review the active file for bugs, security issues, and code quality

commands.name: test
commands.description: Generate Jest + RTL unit tests for the active file

commands.name: e2e
commands.description: Generate Playwright E2E tests for the active file

commands.name: fix
commands.description: Fix an error — paste the stack trace or describe the bug

commands.name: heal
commands.description: Self-heal failing CI tests — run → fix → repeat until green

commands.name: a11y
commands.description: Find and fix WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility violations

commands.name: ci
commands.description: Generate GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline workflows

commands.name: index
commands.description: Index your codebase into a local RAG vector store

commands.name: analytics
commands.description: Add typed Amplitude SDK v2 analytics to your app

commands.name: i18n
commands.description: Add react-i18next internationalisation to your app

commands.name: costs
commands.description: Show token usage and cost breakdown for the current session

commands.name: mcp
commands.description: Run an MCP agent task (figma, jira, github, filesystem, postgres…)

commands.name: help
commands.description: Show all available commands and example prompts

aidev.agentPath.description: Absolute path to your claude-agent/ directory. Leave empty to auto-detect from workspace.

aidev.pythonPath.description: Absolute path to the Python executable inside .venv. Leave empty to auto-detect.

aidev.defaultTestFramework.description: Default test framework used by --heal and --unit-test.

aidev.defaultBaseUrl.description: Base URL used for Playwright E2E test generation.
